abstract: Provides for the capital outlay budget and program for FY 2026-2027; provides for the funding of the capital outlays from the specified sources of monies in the specified amounts as follows: Federal Funds
fullText:
GREEN SHEET REDIGEST
HB 2 2026 Regular Session Bacala
CAPITAL OUTLAY: Provides for the comprehensive Capital Outlay budget.
DIGEST
Provides for the capital outlay budget and program for FY 2026-2027; provides for the
funding of the capital outlays from the specified sources of monies in the specified amounts
as follows:
Federal Funds $ 208,000,000
Federal Funds via Interagency Transfer $ 88,135,000
Fees and Self-Generated Revenues $ 190,600,000
Interagency Transfers $ 67,492,877
Interest Earnings $ 5,000,000
Megaproject Leverage Fund $ 20,000,000
Re-appropriated Cash $ 46,090,990
Revenue Bonds $ 125,000,000
Capital Outlay Savings Fund $ 49,894,000
State General Fund (Direct) $ 7,750,000
State General Fund (Direct) Non-Recurring
Revenues $ 288,172,662
Transportation Trust Fund (TTF) –
Construction Subfund $ 4,300,000
Transportation Trust Fund (TTF) – Federal $ 1,525,000,000
Transportation Trust Fund (TTF) – Regular $ 105,245,415
Louisiana Transportation Infrastructure
Fund $ 315,000,000
State Highway Improvement Fund $ 79,000,000
TOTAL CASH PORTION $ 3,124,680,994
Authorizes the funding of certain capital outlay projects from the sale of general
obligation bonds for the projects delineated as follows:
Priority 1 $ 1,995,983,474
Priority 2 $ 528,411,686
Priority 5 $ 8,666,516,292
TOTAL GENERAL OBLIGATION BONDS $ 11,190,911,452
BONDS NRP $ 843,368
GRAND TOTAL OF ALL MEANS OF FINANCING $ 14,316,435,814
Summary of Amendments Adopted by House
The Committee Amendments Proposed by House Committee on Ways and Means to
the original bill:
1. Change General Obligation funding as follows:
Priority 1 $ 700,000
Priority 2 $ 473,748,686
Priority 5 $ 1,208,046,910
Page 1 of 2
The Committee Amendments Proposed by House Committee on Appropriations to
the engrossed bill:
1. Change the cash portion as follows:
State General Fund (Direct) Non-Recurring Revenues $ 9,460,000
State General Fund (Direct) $ 7,250,000
Capital Outlay Savings Fund $ 7,935,000
Re-appropriated Cash $ 9,325,000
Fees and Self-Generated Revenues $ 24,000,000
Summary of Amendments Adopted by Senate
Committee Amendments Proposed by Senate Committee on Revenue and Fiscal
Affairs to the reengrossed bill
1. Priority 1 $ 2,251,793
2. Priority 2 $ 54,663,000
3. Priority 5 $ 691,445,100
Summary of Amendments Adopted by Senate
Committee Amendments Proposed by Senate Committee on Finance to the
reengrossed bill
1. Change the Cash portion as follows:
State General Fund Non-Recurring Revenues $ 9,100,000
State General fund (Direct) $ 500,000
Capital Outlay Savings Fund $ 41,959,000
Re-appropriated Cash $ 21,205,990
Federal Funds $ 67,000,000
Inter-Agency Transfers $ 64,775,000
Page 2 of 2
